concept: caveated; frequent parentheticals; garden hose; meteorology
answer: Telescope, clarity, tranquility, leafy, vibrant, expansive. Sky, azure, ethereal. Water, gentle, shimmering. Earth, fertile, nurturing. Stars, distant, twinkling. Garden, colorful, fragrant. Light, warm, soft. Clouds, fluffy, white. Wind, gentle, soothing.
